ItacPersonItem.Notes: Also called Il Pellegrino. In 1633 he delivered the following presentation to the Umoristi Academy: `Di tre nuove maniere di verso sdrucciolo` (which was published in Rome by Facciotto, in 1634)
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
